ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot interacting with a laptop.  The robot will place its hands on the laptop as if typing or using it. The sequence starts with the arms at the sides, then moves to a typing pose, holds the pose, and then returns to a resting pose.  The focus is on a smooth, deliberate motion.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready for work
hands move forward to the laptop keyboard
arms return to rest, work complete
